goal: Globalize light frosted-glass header to all EN pages by extending Phase 1 header rules out from under the body[data-page=home] scope.
affects: all EN pages: index, daily, question, question-draw, reading, full, profile
verified: per-page link tag insertion confirmed via grep across all 7 EN pages
new file contains zero body[data-page=home] selectors (header is unscoped, intentional)
cascade order on index.html: theme-tokens -> phase-2-header -> phase-1-home
filed: Phase 2 originally bundled :root token overrides (--color-bg, --panel, etc.); deferred after Step 0 discovery surfaced cascade conflicts on .primary, .btn-primary, .card .back, .result-card. Token flips belong with Phase 4 (results) and Phase 5 (daily board) component refactors.

EN/TH parity intentionally not claimed: Thai pages (/th/*) deliberately not linked phase-2-header.css. Thai font rendering with Playfair Display serif requires separate validation (Safe Rollout Guide Phase 7).
Phase 2.1 backlog item (clickable header logo) recorded in CLAUDE.md, not started.
